query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Here are the **5 filings** that Google (including Google LLC and Google Energy LLC) submitted to FERC between **June and December 2024**, along with their docket numbers:

| # | Filed Date | Title | Docket Number(s) |
|---|-----------|-------|-----------------|
| 1 | 06/28/2024 | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-468-005** |
| 2 | 09/19/2024 | Motion to Intervene of Google LLC | **ER24-2891-000, ER24-2888-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000, ER24-2889-000** |
| 3 | 11/05/2024 | Supplement to Notice of Change in Status of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-2835-011** |
| 4 | 12/10/2024 | Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC | **AD24-11-000** |
| 5 | 12/27/2024 | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Southwest Power Pool Region of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-2835-012** |

### Key Observations:
- **ER10-2835** appears in two filings (sub-dockets 011 and 012), covering Google Energy LLC's market power and change-in-status matters.
- The **September Motion to Intervene** spanned the most dockets (6 total), suggesting Google intervened in a set of related proceedings.
- **AD24-11** relates to a FERC technical conference (likely on data center/AI power demand), where Google submitted post-conference comments.
- The two **Triennial Market Power Analyses** (ER10-468 and ER10-2835) are routine regulatory filings required of market-based rate sellers.
